title: Growatt Bridge Error Envelope
description: Structured error body for HTTP error responses (FR-008). Field names are illustrative until implementation locks the canonical schema.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code (bridge-defined, not upstream raw strings).

message.description: Human-readable summary safe for clients (no raw upstream leakage).

details.description: Optional validation or context (e.g. field errors, supported media types).

retry_after_seconds.description: Present for rate limiting (HTTP 429); MUST match Retry-After header (FR-008).
